user.title: Rohlík EAN
user.description: Adds barcode lookup on top of the Rohlík.cz (rohlikcz) integration. No credentials needed — cart access is handled by HA-RohlikCZ.

abort.already_configured: Already configured — only one instance is needed.
abort.rohlikcz_missing: The Rohlík.cz (rohlikcz) integration was not found. Install and configure HA-RohlikCZ first.

data.trust_ean_hit: Trust a single Rohlík fulltext hit for a raw EAN
data.notify_unresolved: Create a persistent notification for unresolved EANs
data.review_mode: Review mode: stage scans in a list instead of adding to the cart directly
